'''âr-t-z''' ('''karataz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cellularise|cellularise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-t-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cellularise|cellularise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-t-z
|-
! Lemma
| karataz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirataz|thirataz]] || [[word:jirataz|jirataz]] || [[word:shirataz|shirataz]] || [[word:kirataz|kirataz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurataz|thuthurataz]] || [[word:jujurataz|jujurataz]] || [[word:shushurataz|shushurataz]] || [[word:kukurataz|kukurataz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurataz|thurataz]] || [[word:jurataz|jurataz]] || [[word:shurataz|shurataz]] || [[word:kurataz|kurataz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurataz|thurataz]] || [[word:jurataz|jurataz]] || [[word:shurataz|shurataz]] || [[word:kurataz|kurataz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therataz|therataz]] || [[word:jerataz|jerataz]] || [[word:sherataz|sherataz]] || [[word:kerataz|kerataz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorataz|thothorataz]] || [[word:jojorataz|jojorataz]] || [[word:shoshorataz|shoshorataz]] || [[word:kokorataz|kokorataz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorataz|thorataz]] || [[word:jorataz|jorataz]] || [[word:shorataz|shorataz]] || [[word:korataz|korataz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorataz|thorataz]] || [[word:jorataz|jorataz]] || [[word:shorataz|shorataz]] || [[word:korataz|korataz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrataz|thĂŠrataz]] || [[word:jĂŠrataz|jĂŠrataz]] || [[word:shĂŠrataz|shĂŠrataz]] || [[word:kĂŠrataz|kĂŠrataz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharataz|thatharataz]] || [[word:jajarataz|jajarataz]] || [[word:shasharataz|shasharataz]] || [[word:kakarataz|kakarataz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharataz|tharataz]] || [[word:jarataz|jarataz]] || [[word:sharataz|sharataz]] || [[word:karataz|karataz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharataz|tharataz]] || [[word:jarataz|jarataz]] || [[word:sharataz|sharataz]] || [[word:karataz|karataz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharataz|sharataz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharataz|gosharataz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharataz|gokisharataz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharataznĂŒ|sharataznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharataznknĂŒ|gosharataznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharataznĂŒ|gokisharataznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharatazshĂ«|sharatazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharataznkshĂ«|gosharataznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharatazshĂ«|gokisharatazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharatazro|sharatazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharataznkro|gosharataznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharatazro|gokisharatazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharatazmu|sharatazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharataznkmu|gosharataznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharatazmu|gokisharatazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharatazsher|sharatazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharataznksher|gosharataznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharatazsher|gokisharatazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharatazng|sharatazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharataznkng|gosharataznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharatazng|gokisharatazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharatazya|sharatazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharataznkya|gosharataznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharatazya|gokisharatazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharatazyam|sharatazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharataznkyam|gosharataznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharatazyam|gokisharatazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharataznĂŒshĂ«|sharataznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharataznknĂŒshĂ«|gosharataznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharataznĂŒshĂ«|gokisharataznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharataznĂŒro|sharataznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharataznknĂŒro|gosharataznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharataznĂŒro|gokisharataznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharataznĂŒmu|sharataznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharataznknĂŒmu|gosharataznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharataznĂŒmu|gokisharataznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharatazshĂ«nĂŒ|sharatazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharataznkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharataznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharatazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharatazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharatazshĂ«ro|sharatazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharataznkshĂ«ro|gosharataznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharatazshĂ«ro|gokisharatazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharatazshĂ«mu|sharatazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharataznkshĂ«mu|gosharataznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharatazshĂ«mu|gokisharatazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharatazronĂŒ|sharatazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharataznkronĂŒ|gosharataznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharatazronĂŒ|gokisharatazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharatazroshĂ«|sharatazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharataznkroshĂ«|gosharataznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharatazroshĂ«|gokisharatazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharatazromu|sharatazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharataznkromu|gosharataznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharatazromu|gokisharatazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharatazmunĂŒ|sharatazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharataznkmunĂŒ|gosharataznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharatazmunĂŒ|gokisharatazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharatazmushĂ«|sharatazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharataznkmushĂ«|gosharataznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharatazmushĂ«|gokisharatazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharatazmuro|sharatazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharataznkmuro|gosharataznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharatazmuro|gokisharatazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
